textByHash.8ca86565881e25002182db41e5457c64198e2cc3: Hello! Welcome back to my discount camel store. How are those camels getting along?
textByHash.b4a7062297961c59d31064d4d4b5d69885132ee5: Not much really, I just want to thank you for what you have done for this town. I might even stick around now that business is better!
textByHash.c098f6f1ad18a6672f55cfb5ecf182d08c3e522c: Well I've been debating whether I should diversify into camel rental, too. Although I do have all these cages lying around... do you think there's a market for discount jackals?
